docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE; FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, RUDY SANTIAGO CRUZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
